summary: Validated requested commission-route and API changes with backend pytest + frontend Playwright smoke on public URL. Legacy /commission/request redirect and auth gating work, invalid matching-artists category now returns 400, and code review confirms artist payload omits requester email/phone. Auth-required UI payload-level checks remain partially blocked without credentials.

minor.issue: Returns 500 in public runtime logs, causing repeated frontend console errors on pages including login.

integration_issues.flow: Commission request form field-level runtime verification
integration_issues.issue: Could not fully runtime-verify absence of Pricing Type field and presence of Negotiation Allowed selector due auth gating to /login (no test credentials provided).

action_items: Fix/guard /api/notifications/recent 500 to remove global runtime console errors.
Provide authenticated user session/credentials for full UI runtime validation of commission form fields and profile-completion gating states.
critical_code_review_comments: CommissionRequestPage removes Pricing Type UI and keeps only Negotiation Allowed + optional Offer Price (when negotiation enabled).
App routing correctly redirects legacy /commission/request to /user-dashboard/commissions/new.
server.py /api/artist/commissions requester payload uses profiles select('id, full_name') and response item excludes requester email/phone fields.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (routing/auth-gating checks passed; auth-gated form runtime verification partially blocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use authenticated non-artist user with complete and incomplete profiles to verify commission form renders, confirms no Pricing Type control appears, and profile completion gate blocks create call with account redirect. Also recheck /api/artist/commissions payload in live authenticated response body.
rca of the issue: Frontend global notification fetch attempts /api/notifications/recent even on login/unauth pages; backend currently responds 500 in this preview setup, generating repeated console errors but not a hard UI crash.
